subject: Female android figure with lighter coloring, relaxed composed stance, energy effect behind her
description: A female humanoid figure is depicted in a mid-shot composition with a relaxed, self-assured stance. The figure has lighter coloring and wears a dark outfit. An energy aura or effect is visible in the background behind her. The expression is cool and composed — neither overtly aggressive nor friendly. The pose reads as someone who is completely unbothered by the situation, arms loosely positioned. No weapon is visible.
